More Than Just a Coffee Shop

Nestled in the heart of Milestone College, Bangladesh, we began with a simple dream: to create a sanctuary where quality coffee meets artisan pastry craftsmanship.

Every detail — from the hand-selected single-origin beans to the flaky layers of our croissants — reflects our relentless commitment to excellence.

About Us

Our story, values and the people behind every cup

2019Est.

Our Story

Milestone Coffee & Pastry Shop started as a dream to bring premium coffee culture to the vibrant campus community of Milestone College.

Founded by passionate coffee enthusiasts, we set up our cozy corner to be more than just a cafe — we wanted to be the heartbeat of campus life.

From that first cup to thousands served daily, our commitment to quality, warmth, and community has never wavered.

Our Core Values

🌿

Quality First

Only the finest ingredients make it into your cup and plate

✨

Craft & Passion

Every item prepared with expertise, care and genuine love

🌟

Consistency

The same great taste every single day, every visit

💙

Community

Building lasting bonds with every customer we serve
